BodyMetric™
Physique Intelligence
Take or upload a clear photo of yourself standing naturally — front-facing, full body if possible. BodyMetric AI scans your physique to build a training plan, set calorie targets, and track progress over time.
For the best scan
Good lighting, no harsh shadows
Fitted clothing or gym wear
Stand straight, arms slightly away from your sides
Plain background if possible
Your photo is analyzed privately and never shared.

Your plan will avoid movements that stress any area you tap. This is not medical advice — if you have a serious condition, consult your doctor before starting any programme.
